/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,--version-script=/home/el/Documents/Programming/chair/SDL_ttf/src/SDL_ttf.sym -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libSDL3_ttf.so.0 -o ../libSDL3_ttf.so.0.3.0 "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_hashtable_ttf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_gpu_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_renderer_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_surface_textengine.c.o" "CMakeFiles/SDL3_ttf-shared.dir/src/SDL_ttf.c.o"  /usr/lib/libSDL3.so.0.4.0 /usr/lib/libharfbuzz.so /usr/lib/libfreetype.so
